justification.personality: The book features the Fat Lady in multiple, varied roles (guarding the common room, being tricked, etc.), while the film only shows her in a very limited capacity (Scene 1). The tone is less developed in the film.
justification.narrative_role: The book uses the Fat Lady as a recurring structural element of the castle's mystery and history. The film reduces her role to a single, functional password gatekeeper.
justification.motivations: In the books, her motivations are tied to the general security and history of the common room. The film gives her no discernible motivation beyond opening the door when prompted.
justification.character_arc: The book shows her interacting with characters and being part of the general castle lore, implying a dynamic role. The film presents her as a static element that only opens when the password is known, showing no arc.

comparative.key_observations: The film significantly minimizes the Fat Lady's presence and complexity compared to the book, reducing her to a single, functional plot device.
